nodes.name: Supabase: briefs changed since last run

parameters.text: =New client comments on *{{ $json.fileName }}* — {{ $json.openCount }} open. Brief updated: {{ $json.dashboardUrl }}

parameters.content:
NOTIFICATIONS ONLY. This workflow does NOT run the engine — the VPS cron (/root/figma-comments/poll.js) does that and writes figma_briefs. Here we just poll Supabase for briefs whose generated_at is newer than the last run and announce them.

Env expected on the n8n container: SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, DASHBOARD_URL. Credentials are placeholder refs — pick your real Supabase anon (Header Auth) + Slack creds on import. Swap the Slack node for a Notion node (n8n-nodes-base.notion, create page/append block) if Carl prefers Notion. See FigmaComments/ARCHITECTURE.md.

Note: the 20-min lookback window (generated_at >= now-20m) must stay wider than this schedule interval (15m) so nothing slips between runs; dedupe is by newest-brief-per-file in the Code node.

main.node: Supabase: briefs changed since last run
